title: 有馬記念の後に・涙の先へ、いつか

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara happily talks about how she heard the
cheers from the stands during her race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she wholeheartedly insists that she had fun
today... tears begin to trickle down her cheeks,
and she cries out of frustration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing how hard she's taking this loss, I realize
how seriously she took this race... and how much
she's grown since the days when she ran carefree.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's Arima Kinen journey comes to a
close. She successfully reached her dream race...
and for that, she should be very proud.
